description: Send notifications to your own Parse Platform destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise parseps:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Parse Platform push payload delivered straight to your Parse Server.
name: msg-to-parseplatform

request.template: {"urls":"parseps://${ customer_secrets.PARSEPLATFORM_APP_ID }:${ customer_secrets.PARSEPLATFORM_MASTER_KEY }@${ customer_secrets.PARSEPLATFORM_HOST }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"parseps://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.app_id_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.master_key_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"where":{},"data":{"alert":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}}
{"where":{},"data":{"alert":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}}
